headline: Here is Why Ventas (VTR) is One of the Best Large Cap Stocks to Buy Under $100
summary: Ventas Inc. (NYSE:VTR) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $100. On April 27, Ventas reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, driven primarily by organic growth in its senior housing operating portfolio/SHOP. The company achieved net income attributable to common stockholders of $0.11 per share and Normalized Funds From Operations/FFO […]
